subcodes.first_line: O ye who are associated with His Holiness Mishkín, Jináb-i-Mishkín-Qalam is present and observing, like unto a rare student with sword [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منتسبین حضرت مشکین جناب مشکین قلم حاضر و ناظر و مانند محصل نادر با سیف
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @exhortations and counsels, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
